record.field: WG-Easy is the easiest way to run a WireGuard VPN server with a clean web admin interface.

WG-Easy is the easiest way to run a WireGuard VPN server with a clean web admin interface.

It bundles WireGuard and a Vue-based management UI into a single, all-in-one deployment, removing the need to hand-edit configuration files. Administrators create, edit, enable and remove VPN clients from the browser, while users receive ready-to-use configs via QR code or file download. It targets homelabs, small teams and self-hosters who want a secure VPN tunnel without command-line WireGuard administration.

Key features
  • Web UI to list, create, edit, enable, disable and delete VPN clients
  • One-click client provisioning with QR codes and downloadable configuration files
  • Connection statistics with live Tx/Rx traffic charts and client expiration management
  • Built-in authentication with Argon2 password hashing and TOTP two-factor authentication
  • Per-client firewall filtering, IPv6 and CIDR support, and Prometheus metrics
  • Multilingual interface, automatic light/dark mode and a single-container Docker deployment
Best for

Homelabs, small businesses and individuals who need a fast, secure, self-hosted WireGuard VPN with an approachable management dashboard instead of manual CLI configuration.

services: wg-easy: environment: - INIT_ENABLED=1 - INIT_HOST={{ wireguard_host }} - INIT_PORT=51820 - INIT_USERNAME=admin - INIT_PASSWORD={{ wireguard_password }} - INIT_DNS=1.1.1.1,8.8.8.8 - PORT=51821 image: ghcr.io/wg-easy/wg-easy:15 container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' volumes: - ./etc_wireguard:/etc/wireguard - /lib/modules:/lib/modules:ro ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:51821' restart: unless-stopped cap_add: - NET_ADMIN - SYS_MODULE - NET_RAW sysctls: - net.ipv4.ip_forward=1 - net.ipv4.conf.all.src_valid_mark=1 - net.ipv6.conf.all.disable_ipv6=0 - net.ipv6.conf.all.forwarding=1 - net.ipv6.conf.default.forwarding=1 networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true
